exercises.title: Coherence Time Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate memory coherence requirements for different scenarios.
tasks: Model segment generation time vs distance
Calculate minimum coherence for given repeater config
Find maximum distance for given memory

exercises.title: Multiplexing Optimizer
tasks: Model rate improvement vs number of modes
Find optimal mode count for given coherence
hints: More modes = higher success, but limited by coherence
Temporal, spectral, spatial have different trade-offs

exercises.title: Platform Comparison Tool
exercises.description: Compare quantum memory platforms for repeater applications.
tasks: Model each platform (atoms, ions, NV, rare-earth)
Find best platform for given requirements
hints: Different platforms excel at different metrics
Efficiency × Fidelity × (1 if T2 sufficient else 0)

exercises.title: Memory-Limited Rate Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze how memory limitations affect repeater rates.
tasks: Find memory parameters for target rate
hints: Higher efficiency partially compensates lower coherence
